name: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate
tagline: The most popular cloud certification for designing AWS workloads
about: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate validates the ability to design distributed systems on AWS that meet customer requirements for availability, cost, performance, and security. One of the highest-demand cloud certifications by job posting volume.

name: Microsoft Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
tagline: Foundational Azure knowledge for cloud beginners and decision-makers
about: AZ-900 covers cloud concepts, core Azure services, security, privacy, compliance, pricing, and support. It is Microsoft's entry-level cloud certification and a common stepping stone toward associate-level Azure certifications.

name: Microsoft Azure Administrator Associate (AZ-104)
tagline: Day-to-day Azure infrastructure administration skills
about: AZ-104 validates skills for managing Azure subscriptions, identities, storage, virtual networks, compute resources, and monitoring. It is Microsoft's most in-demand associate-level Azure certification for cloud administrators.

name: ISC2 CISSP
tagline: The gold-standard senior cybersecurity certification
about: CISSP (Certified Information Systems Security Professional) covers eight security domains: security and risk management, asset security, architecture, communications, identity management, assessment, operations, and software security. Frequently a hiring requirement for senior security roles.

name: ITIL 4 Foundation
tagline: The most widely adopted IT service management framework
about: ITIL 4 Foundation introduces the ITIL service value system, the four dimensions of service management, key practices, and core principles. It is the most commonly listed ITSM credential on enterprise IT job postings.

name: OSHA 10-Hour Construction
tagline: Required entry-level safety training for construction workers
about: OSHA 10-Hour Construction covers worker safety rights, fall protection, electrical hazards, struck-by and caught-in hazards, personal protective equipment, and health hazards. Required by many states and employers before working on construction sites.

name: OSHA 30-Hour Construction
tagline: Supervisor-level construction safety certification
about: OSHA 30-Hour Construction provides expanded safety training for supervisors and workers with safety responsibilities. Covers all OSHA 10 topics in greater depth plus management of safety programs, recordkeeping, and incident investigation.

name: Forklift Operator Certification
tagline: Required certification for operating powered industrial trucks
about: Forklift Operator Certification covers truck types and capacities, stability principles, pre-shift inspection, safe operation in pedestrian areas, load handling, and refueling/recharging. Required by OSHA 29 CFR 1910.178 for any worker operating a forklift on the job.

name: CPR / AED Certification
tagline: Lifesaving cardiac and breathing emergency skills
about: CPR/AED certification covers chest compressions, rescue breathing, and automated external defibrillator use for adult, child, and infant emergencies. A common requirement for healthcare workers, teachers, lifeguards, fitness staff, and many other roles.

name: Basic Life Support (BLS)
tagline: Required CPR-level credential for healthcare professionals
about: BLS certification covers high-quality CPR, AED use, ventilation with barrier devices and bag-mask, and team-based resuscitation for adults, children, and infants. Required for nurses, EMTs, doctors, and most clinical healthcare roles.

name: EMT (Emergency Medical Technician)
tagline: Entry-level certification for emergency medical services
about: EMT certification covers patient assessment, airway management, trauma care, medical emergencies, pharmacology, and ambulance operations. Required by most states for ambulance and emergency response roles, validated through NREMT cognitive and psychomotor exams.

name: Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA)
tagline: Entry point into the nursing and long-term care field
about: CNA covers basic nursing skills, infection control, vital signs, communication, residents' rights, and personal care. Required for working in nursing homes and long-term care under federal OBRA regulations and tested via state competency exams.

name: Certified Medical Assistant (CMA)
tagline: Clinical and administrative support for medical practices
about: Medical Assistant certifications (CMA, RMA, CCMA) cover clinical procedures, medical terminology, anatomy, phlebotomy basics, EKG, vital signs, medication administration, and front-office tasks like scheduling, insurance, and EHR documentation.

name: Certified Phlebotomy Technician (CPT)
tagline: Specialized blood-draw certification for clinical labs
about: CPT certification covers venipuncture, capillary collection, specimen handling, patient identification, infection control, anatomy of the circulatory system, and clinical lab procedures. A short-program credential commonly used as an entry point into healthcare.

name: Medical Billing and Coding (CPC / CCS)
tagline: Healthcare reimbursement, ICD-10, CPT, and HCPCS coding
about: Medical Billing and Coding certifications (CPC from AAPC, CCS from AHIMA) cover ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes, CPT procedure codes, HCPCS Level II codes, anatomy, medical terminology, payer rules, and the revenue cycle. High-demand role with strong remote-work options.

name: CDL Class A
tagline: Federal license required to drive tractor-trailers and large combination vehicles
about: CDL Class A licensing covers vehicle inspection, basic vehicle control, on-road driving, air brakes, combination vehicles, and federal motor carrier safety regulations. Required for operating any combination vehicle with a gross vehicle weight rating over 26,001 pounds.

name: FAA Part 107 (Remote Pilot)
tagline: Required certificate for commercial drone operations in the U.S.
about: FAA Part 107 covers airspace classification, weather, drone performance, regulations, emergency procedures, and operational limitations. Required by 14 CFR Part 107 for any commercial small unmanned aircraft (sUAS) operations in the United States.

name: FAA Private Pilot Certificate
tagline: Foundational pilot certificate for personal flight
about: Private Pilot Certificate covers regulations, navigation, weather, aerodynamics, aircraft systems, performance and weight balance, and emergency procedures. Required for piloting most personal single-engine aircraft and a stepping stone toward commercial pilot training.

name: A&P (Airframe and Powerplant) Mechanic
tagline: FAA certification for aircraft maintenance technicians
about: A&P certification covers airframe structures, systems, powerplant theory, inspection, and FAA regulations. Required for performing or signing off most airline and general-aviation maintenance work in the United States.

name: Real Estate Salesperson License
tagline: State-required license to legally represent real estate buyers and sellers
about: Real Estate Salesperson licensing covers real estate principles, contracts, agency, financing, fair housing, property management, valuation, and state-specific law. Required by every U.S. state for representing clients in real estate transactions for compensation.

name: Insurance Producer License
tagline: State licenses for selling life, health, and property/casualty insurance
about: Insurance Producer licensing covers insurance principles, policy types, regulations, ethics, and state-specific law for life, health, and property and casualty lines. Required by every state for selling, soliciting, or negotiating insurance products.

name: NMLS Mortgage Loan Originator (MLO)
tagline: Federal SAFE Act licensing exam for mortgage originators
about: NMLS MLO covers federal mortgage law (RESPA, TILA, ECOA, HMDA), mortgage products and programs, ethics, uniform state content, and state-specific law. Required by the SAFE Act for any individual originating residential mortgage loans.

name: ServSafe Food Handler
tagline: Entry-level food safety certification for restaurant workers
about: ServSafe Food Handler covers basic food safety, personal hygiene, cross-contamination, time and temperature control, cleaning and sanitizing, and allergen awareness. Required by many state and local jurisdictions for anyone handling food in restaurants.

name: ServSafe Food Protection Manager
tagline: ANSI-accredited manager-level food safety certification
about: ServSafe Food Protection Manager certification covers foodborne illness, the flow of food, food safety management systems, sanitary facilities and equipment, regulatory authorities, and crisis management. Accepted by jurisdictions nationwide as the food protection manager certification.

name: EPA 608 Refrigerant Handling Certification
tagline: Federal certification required to handle HVAC refrigerants
about: EPA 608 covers ozone depletion, the Clean Air Act, refrigerant recovery and recycling, leak detection, safety, and shipping for stationary refrigeration and air-conditioning equipment. Required under EPA Section 608 for purchasing or servicing equipment containing regulated refrigerants.

name: Electrician License (Apprentice / Journeyman / Master)
tagline: State-licensed credential for residential and commercial electrical work
about: Electrician licensing covers the National Electrical Code (NEC), wiring methods, conductor sizing, overcurrent protection, grounding and bonding, motors, transformers, hazardous locations, and safety. Licensed at apprentice, journeyman, and master levels by state regulators.

name: Plumbing License (Apprentice / Journeyman / Master)
tagline: State-licensed credential for plumbing system installation and repair
about: Plumbing licensing covers code (UPC or IPC), drain-waste-vent systems, water supply, fixture installation, gas piping, backflow prevention, and trade safety. Licensed at apprentice, journeyman, and master levels by state regulators.

name: ASE Automotive Certification
tagline: Industry-standard certification for automotive technicians
about: ASE Automotive certifications cover engine repair, transmission, drivetrain, suspension and steering, brakes, electrical systems, HVAC, engine performance, light-duty diesel, and maintenance and light repair. Most automotive repair shops prefer or require ASE-certified technicians.

name: AWS Certified Welder
tagline: Performance-based certification for production welders
about: AWS Certified Welder is a performance-based credential confirming a welder can produce sound welds to a specified procedure on a specified material and process. Widely accepted across construction, manufacturing, pipeline, and shipbuilding industries.

name: Cosmetology License
tagline: State-licensed credential for hair, skin, and nail services
about: Cosmetology licensing covers hair cutting and styling, chemical services, skin care, nail care, sanitation and infection control, anatomy, and state-specific law. Required by every state for performing cosmetology services for compensation.

name: Barber License
tagline: State-licensed credential for barbering services
about: Barber licensing covers haircutting, shaving, beard trimming, sanitation, scalp and skin care, anatomy, and state-specific law. Required by every state for performing barbering services for compensation.

name: Esthetician License
tagline: State-licensed credential for skin care services
about: Esthetician licensing covers facials, hair removal, makeup, skin analysis, chemical exfoliation, sanitation, anatomy, and state-specific law. Required by most states for performing professional skin care services for compensation.

name: Certified Personal Trainer (NASM-CPT)
tagline: NCCA-accredited personal training certification
about: NASM-CPT covers the OPT (Optimum Performance Training) model, exercise science, assessment, program design, nutrition, and client behavior change. NCCA-accredited and one of the most widely accepted personal trainer certifications in the United States.

name: Project Management Professional (PMP)
tagline: The flagship project management certification
about: PMP validates skills in leading projects across predictive (waterfall), agile, and hybrid approaches. Covers people, process, and business environment domains. Required or preferred for many senior project manager and program manager roles across industries.

name: QuickBooks ProAdvisor
tagline: Intuit-certified credential for QuickBooks Online and Desktop
about: QuickBooks ProAdvisor certification covers the use of QuickBooks Online for setup, lists, transactions, banking, sales tax, payroll, and reports for accounting and bookkeeping professionals. Free certification offered by Intuit through QuickBooks Online Accountant.
